sections.title: 1. N+1 Query Patterns
sections.content:
**None found** — this is a static marketing site with no data fetching. If real API calls are added later, the `workers` array in `Workers.tsx` is the natural place where N+1 would emerge (fetching worker details per card).

---

sections.title: 2. Unnecessary Re-renders
3. Caching Opportunities
4. Memory Leaks
5. Redundant Computations
Priority Summary
sections.content:
| Issue | Impact | Effort |
|---|---|---|
| Hoist static arrays out of components | Medium | Low |
| Add `loading="lazy"` to images | High on mobile | Low |
| Pause infinite animations when off-screen | Medium (battery/GPU) | Low |
| Code-split below-fold sections | High (initial load) | Medium |
| Precompute nav slugs | Low | Low |
| Simplify dead conditional | Low | Low |
